_doc: Psychology-driven choreography for the 4 vertical customer-wall TVs. Each TV has its own narrative arc designed for a customer's gaze pattern (left → center → right → counter). Stagger is verified Latin-rectangle: at every slot, all 4 TVs show different combos. 108s loop. Simultaneous transitions every 18s.
_creative_inventory: 12 locked finals — 6 statics + 6 videos for combos C1–C6. Source: hamzaexpress.in/ops/tv-mission-control/manifest.json (verified 2026-05-04).

_consumer_psychology.gaze_pattern: Customer enters → eye lands on V2 (LEFT) first → V1 (CENTER, dominant) → V3 (RIGHT) → V4 (BAIN MARIE at counter, seen at order time)
_consumer_psychology.v2_role: ANCHOR — first impression. Climbing price ladder ₹149 → ₹309. Tells the customer: 'eating starts at ₹149, look at the spectrum.'
_consumer_psychology.v1_role: HERO / DOMINANT — Smart Pick first (C3 ₹249), then premium climb. Reinforces the recommended choice.
_consumer_psychology.v3_role: UPSELL ANCHOR — Premium first (C6 ₹309 Mutton Biryani). Anchors high so other TVs feel like better value.
_consumer_psychology.v4_role: AT-COUNTER TRIGGER — Bestseller first (C5 Chicken Biryani ₹229, top-selling protein). Visible during order interaction.
_consumer_psychology.decoy_strategy: Goldilocks pricing: V3 anchors high (₹309), V2 anchors low (₹149), C3 Smart Pick (₹249) is positioned as the rational middle. Customer's eye triangulates to C3.
_consumer_psychology.rhythm: All 4 TVs hard-cut every 18s simultaneously → 'wall changes' moment that re-engages a wandering gaze.
_consumer_psychology.balance_per_slot: At every moment, all 4 TVs show different combos — customer perceives variety, not repetition. Verified via Latin-rectangle constraint.

name: psychology_v1_combos
description: Phase 1 base config — combos C1–C6 across 4 vertical TVs with psychology-driven slot order and verified stagger. Replaces the cyclic-shift stagger in all_combos.json with a narrative-per-TV approach.

_slot_map._legend: At time T, slot index = (T // 18) % 6. Each slot is one combo (8s static + 10s video pair).

slot_0_t0s._psychology: Full price ladder visible at once. Customer sees range from cheap to premium and bestseller — paralysis-of-choice mitigated by visual differentiation.
